mapper.select: SELECT oi.*, COALESCE(p.name, oi.product_name_snapshot, CONCAT('#', oi.product_id)) as product_name, COALESCE(p.image_url, oi.image_url_snapshot) as image_url FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId}

SELECT oi.*, COALESCE(p.name, oi.product_name_snapshot, CONCAT('#', oi.product_id)) as product_name, COALESCE(p.image_url, oi.image_url_snapshot) as image_url FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id

SELECT oi.*, COALESCE(p.name, oi.product_name_snapshot, CONCAT('#', oi.product_id)) as product_name, COALESCE(p.image_url, oi.image_url_snapshot) as image_url FROM order_items oi LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.id WHERE oi.order_id = #{orderId} AND oi.product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, product_id, quantity, price, product_name_snapshot, image_url_snapshot, selected_specs, created_at) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{price}, #{productNameSnapshot}, #{imageUrlSnapshot}, #{selectedSpecs}, #{createdAt})
